title: Enchant Everything
description: Lets you combine any vanilla enchantment on any item
body:
# 🛠️ Features: 1.16.5 – 1.21+

### Anvil Enchanting
**How to use:** Stand on an **Anvil** and drop an item near you (max 4 blocks). Then, drop an **Enchanted Book** directly on top of the item.

* **The Result:** The item is enchanted with the **first enchantment** listed in the book.
* **Important:** If the book has multiple enchantments, only the first is applied; the others are lost.
* **Vanilla Limits:** Enchantments must be vanilla types and within vanilla levels.

#### Enchantment Incompatibilities
This system ignores vanilla restrictions! You can combine:
* **Infinity** and **Mending**
* **Sharpness** and **Smite**
* **All Protection types** on one piece of armor.
* **Universal Application:** Put any vanilla enchantment on any item (except other books).

#### Cross-Compatibility
* **1.16.5 – 1.20.4:** No.
* **1.20.5+:** Yes (except for Quick Charge).

> [!WARNING]
> In versions **below 1.20.5**, you cannot overwrite levels. For example, if you have Sharpness I, you cannot apply Sharpness V to replace it. Overwriting is only supported in **1.20.5 and above**.

![Throwing book and trident](https://i.imgur.com/lqCATo9.gif)

---

### Grindstone Decurser
**How to use:** Stand on a **Grindstone** and drop an item near you (max 4 blocks).

* **1.16.5 – 1.20.6:** All enchantments removed (including Curses).
* **1.21+:** Only Curses are removed.

![Throwing trident](https://i.imgur.com/nGxumHd.gif)

---

### Repair Cost Reset
**How to use:** Stand on a **Gold Block** and drop an item near you (max 4 blocks).
* The item's **Repair Cost** (Prior Work Penalty) will be completely reset.

![Gold block reset](https://i.imgur.com/NrK6f7J.gif)

---

### Armored Elytra
**How to use:** Stand on **End Stone** and drop an **Elytra** and a **Netherite Ingot** together.
* The ingot is consumed, and the Elytra gains the **same armor protection** as a Netherite Chestplate.

![End stone upgrade](https://i.imgur.com/WJ97g4b.gif)

---

# 🚀 Features: 1.20.5 – 1.20.6
*Includes all features from 1.16.5, plus:*

1.  **Unbound Levels:** Enchantments no longer need to be within vanilla levels.
2.  **Level Overwriting:** Newer levels overwrite older ones (e.g., Sharpness II -> Sharpness V).
3.  **Craftable Enchantments:** All enchantments are craftable. Use **JEI** or the vanilla recipe book to see recipes.
    * *Tip: Use `/recipe give @s *` to unlock all recipes.*

---

# ⚔️ Features: 1.21+
*Includes all features from 1.20.6, plus:*

* **Classic Sharpness:** Returns to **+1.25 attack damage** per level (pre-1.9).
* **Improved Soul Speed:** No durability loss on soul sand. No sounds/particles.
* **Thorns Buff:** No longer reduces item durability on proc.
* **Unbreaking Rework:** Formula simplified for all gear:
    * **Level 1:** 60% chance to save durability.
    * **Level 2-4:** +10% chance per level.
    * **Level 5:** 100% chance (Unbreakable).
* **Lunge Mechanics:** No hunger/durability cost. Works **vertically**, **underwater**, and while **falling**.
